backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that tracks and exposes total footsteps, energy (Wh), and runtime (seconds) with query and update methods, including input validation via Runtime.trap.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four product features (ESP32 connectivity, dashboard, graphs, lifetime stats) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of every component and hook.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color roles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'ESP32 Footstep Power Generator' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together ESP32 connection, chart data, and lifetime stats hooks, manages tab state and step animation, and renders Layout with Dashboard or GraphScreen.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom tab bar component with Dashboard and Graphs buttons that applies an active CSS modifier based on the current tab prop.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard view rendering primary metric cards (steps, power, battery), secondary metrics (voltage, current, energy), an offline banner, a power-flow animation bar, and a lifetime stats section.
frontend/src/components/GraphScreen.tsx: Live charts screen rendering four Recharts LineCharts (Power, Steps, Battery, Energy vs Time) with gradient strokes, dark tooltips, and a connection status badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header displaying the brand logo, a connection status badge, and a settings toggle button that shows or hides the SettingsPanel.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app shell layout component that composes Header, BottomNavigation, a main content area, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx: Renders a styled metric display card with an icon, value, unit, label, accent color variants, and optional animation classes for step/charge/power events.
frontend/src/components/SettingsPanel.ts: Provides a settings panel UI for configuring and saving the ESP32 device URL, with save/cancel actions and an Enter key shortcut.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChartData.ts: Custom hook that maintains a rolling buffer of up to 60 time-stamped data points for power, steps, battery, and energy metrics derived from sensor readings.
frontend/src/hooks/useESP32Connection.ts: Custom hook that polls an ESP32 device URL every second, manages connection status (ONLINE/OFFLINE/CONNECTING), and persists the URL to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useLifetimeStats.ts: Custom hook that tracks cumulative footsteps, energy generated, and runtime by diffing sensor data, persists stats to localStorage, and syncs deltas to an ICP backend actor every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder module indicating that lifetime stats queries are handled directly in the useLifetimeStats hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining design tokens (colors, spacing, typography), app shell layout, header, navigation, card, and animation styles using CSS custom properties and Tailwind directives.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Orbitron, Inter), oklch-based semantic color tokens, neon accent colors, border radii, and neon box-shadow utilities. Includes the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for an ESP32 Footstep Power Generator web app, documenting architectural notes, known issues, required images, and a list of already-implemented features with their requirement IDs.
